limitations: The $115 million balance sheet figure reflects current market value of the minority stake (including a $93 million unrealized gain), not cumulative cash invested; actual cash outlay appears to be approximately $10 million in 2025 plus prior-year amounts — investment intensity score reflects named but modestly scaled commitment.
The healthcare generative AI company is not named and its products/use cases are not described, limiting concreteness scoring to level 3.

Risk-section excerpts labeled 'risk_factors' contain financial results discussion rather than a traditional risk-factor section; the AI risk mention appears in item_1b (cybersecurity), which names AI as an external threat vector but does not describe company-specific AI operational or regulatory risks in depth.
No AI R&D or internal AI deployment programs are described; AI exposure is entirely through a minority financial investment.
